name: aioffice-hwp-marketplace
description: Single-plugin marketplace shipping AIOFFICE-HWP — Korean Hangul Word Processor (.hwp / .hwpx) support for Claude and Codex.

plugins.name: aioffice-hwp
plugins.description: Read, create, and edit Korean Hangul Word Processor documents (.hwp / .hwpx) in Claude. Built on the rhwp WebAssembly viewer/editor — no Hancom Office, no LibreOffice, no Windows COM required.

plugins.name: aioffice-capture
plugins.description: Upload a .hwp / .hwpx to 한컴독스 (Hancom Docs) and capture how it actually renders — full-page screenshots, zoomed regions, find-by-text. Optional companion to aioffice-hwp for verifying Hancom compatibility. Headless Playwright; one-time Hancom Docs login required.
